assertions.description: DDR3.sch contains IC301 (MT41K128M16JT-125K FBGA96 DDR3 SDRAM) with a full DDR3 bus (DDR3_CK_P/N, DDR3_DQS0/1_P/N, DDR3_A[0..14], DDR3_nRAS/nCAS/nWE). The LogAn.sch.json output reports memory_interfaces: 0 items. The differential pairs for DDR3_CK and DDR3_DQS are correctly detected, but the memory interface itself is not recognized.
